name: Captain John Price | the captain's hat
description:
the cowboy hat rule.

A rule made to keep people from stealing a cowboy hat. If you wear a cowboy's hat, you have to ride the cowboy, keeping the hat on the whole time.

Who knew it would be that same for Jonathan Price and his beloved boonie hat.

😜

[Should I do one for our cod boys, and some others, like Graves, Alejandro, Rudy? ☺️]
creator: Lonebean
